_note: gbp_photo suppression removed 2026-03-07: Photos now working via pre-staged Supabase sourceUrl method. 3/3 uploads succeeded. The v4 direct bytes upload may still be broken but sourceUrl bypasses it entirely.
_note_categories: gbp_categories_update suppressed globally 2026-03-19: API returns 400 INVALID_ARGUMENT on categories.primary_category for both Mr Green and AZ Turf. Brain sends gcid values Google rejects. Suppress until gcid validation is fixed or API format investigated.

learned_rules: gbp_photo works reliably when photos are pre-staged in Supabase storage (sourceUrl method). Direct bytes upload to GBP v4 is unreliable.
